application.name: Turbo — Secure Task Management
application.summary: Multi-tenant task board with organization hierarchy, JWT authentication, role-based access control (Owner, Admin, Viewer), audit logging, and an Angular dashboard with Kanban-style workflows. Backend: NestJS + TypeORM + SQLite. Frontend: Angular (standalone components) + Tailwind CSS.

project.description: REST API with global prefix /api. Global JwtAuthGuard; @Public() for login.
project.build-serve: npx nx run api:build | npx nx run api:serve

project.description: Browser client; dev server proxies /api to backend.
project.build-serve: npx nx run dashboard:build | npx nx run dashboard:serve

project.description: Shared enums, interfaces, team-permission helpers (no Nest/Angular).
JWT payload types, RequestUser, @Public, @Roles, ROLES_KEY for reflector.
HTTP e2e against running API (login smoke).
Browser e2e; minimal landing/login heading check.

variables.var: Symmetric secret for signing access tokens.
Token TTL in seconds; non-numeric falls back to 28800 in AuthModule.

persistence.synchronize: true (development convenience; production should use migrations)

entity.name: Organization
entity.fields: id (uuid), name, parentOrganizationId nullable, createdAt, updatedAt
entity.behavior: Self-referential tree (parent/children). Seed: Acme Corp → Engineering, Marketing.

entity.name: User
entity.fields: id, name, email unique, passwordHash, role (OWNER|ADMIN|VIEWER), organizationId FK, teamPermissionOverrides nullable JSON (team matrix UI), createdAt, updatedAt

entity.name: Task
entity.fields: title, description, status, priority, category, dueDate nullable, sortOrder, creatorId, assigneeId nullable, organizationId, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt (soft delete)

entity.name: AuditLog
entity.fields: userId, organizationId, action, resourceType, resourceId nullable, result, metadata JSON nullable, createdAt

component.behavior: Idempotent ensure of demo orgs (Acme Corp, Engineering, Marketing) and demo users (three roles per org) with bcrypt password password123. Updates user display names when seed definition changes. Inserts sample tasks only when task table is empty.

public-endpoints.endpoint: Validates email/password (bcrypt); returns access_token and user summary.

authentication.protected-pattern: Authorization: Bearer <token> on all other API routes unless @Public()

jwt-payload.includes: email, organizationId, role in token claims (AuthService); JwtStrategy validate reloads User from DB by sub for RequestUser.

authentication.strategy: passport-jwt from Authorization header; secret JWT_SECRET.

guard.scope: Applied on Users, Tasks, Organizations, AuditLog controllers
guard.rule: If no @Roles metadata, any authenticated user passes.
Otherwise user rank must be >= required role: VIEWER=1, ADMIN=2, OWNER=3 (Owner satisfies ADMIN routes).

organization-scope.owner: visibleOrganizationIds returns recursive subtree starting at actor.organizationId.
organization-scope.used-by: Tasks list/get/update/delete; user listing; audit listing; assignee validation; team permission updates.

authorization.matrix-ui: Owner-only PATCH persists a clamped permission map per user for Team tab UI. Task and audit enforcement remain role-based; flags are not read by TasksService for authorization today.

tasks.create: New task organizationId set to user.organizationId (creator home org).
tasks.list: All non-deleted tasks in visibleOrganizationIds; optional query status, category; ordered by sortOrder, createdAt.

update.admin-owner: May change fields per DTO; assignee must be in visible org ids; status transitions validated (non-viewer allowed targets OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, VERIFIED).
update.viewer: Only if task.assigneeId === user.userId; only status and sortOrder in body; cannot set VERIFIED; transitions only OPEN→IN_PROGRESS or IN_PROGRESS→DONE; cannot change assignee.

tasks.response-enrichment: organizationName attached for display when listing/single task.

users.list: Members in visibleOrganizationIds; includes organizationName; includes teamPermissionOverrides.
users.patch-role: Target in scope; cannot change OWNER; cannot change self; only ADMIN or VIEWER; clears teamPermissionOverrides on success; audit UPDATE_USER_ROLE.
users.patch-team-permissions: Target in scope; not for OWNER users; body.permissions nested booleans; server clamps to role max; audit UPDATE_USER_TEAM_PERMISSIONS.

domain-rules.organizations: GET tree rows (id, name, parentOrganizationId) for visible scope; ADMIN rank.
domain-rules.audit-log: List recent entries for visible org scope with resolved userName, userEmail, organizationName where possible; ADMIN rank.

team-permissions.keys: viewTasks, editAssignedTasks, createTasks, editAnyTask, deleteTasks, verifyTasks, viewAuditLog, manageTeam

auth.storage: localStorage for token and user snapshot
auth.interceptor: Attaches Bearer token to HttpClient requests

services.service: list users, patch role, patch team-permissions

dashboard-features.feature: Kanban columns by TaskStatus with Angular CDK drag-drop; connected lists omit VERIFIED column for viewers
Category filter; create/edit modals with assignee select from org users
Verify and delete (elevated); delete confirmation modal
Team tab for Owner only: nested org branches, promote/demote Admin↔Viewer, row click opens permission matrix modal
Login page with demo account tables by org

audit-events.examples: CREATE_TASK, UPDATE_TASK, DELETE_TASK, UPDATE_USER_ROLE, UPDATE_USER_TEAM_PERMISSIONS, and related success metadata

scripts.script: Optional extra mock tasks for local demos
Align DB user display names with seed naming scheme

operational-notes.note: API and dashboard must both run for full UI; proxy forwards /api to PORT 3000.
Invalid JWT_EXPIRES_SEC historically caused login 500; AuthModule defensively parses numeric TTL.
SQLite file path ensured (mkdir) before TypeORM connects.

future-work.item: Wire team_permission_overrides into task/audit authorization alongside UserRole; mirror in UI.
Migrations instead of synchronize; refresh tokens; expanded automated tests.
